commentaries.author: Douay Rheims 1609
commentaries.content:
THEREFORE David, and the officers of the host separated for the ministry the sons of Asaph, and Heman, and (a) Idithun: which should (b) prophecy on harps, & psalteries, & cymbals according to their number serving the office dedicated to them.
(a) Otherwise called Ethan. ch. 6. v. 44. c. 15. v. 19. 
(b) They played on instruments, Psalms and Canticles made by Prophets.

methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
